source_discovery_method: virtual source target for the official Search API; no tenant URL guessing
list_fetch_method: bounded official Search API GET with Authorization-Key, User-Agent, polite pagination, and final-host guard
detail_fetch_method: not enabled; fixture-backed list payload exposes the certified fields
pagination_method: respect SearchResult.UserArea.NumberOfPages with a bounded max page cap; do not brute-force ids
canonical_url_rule: use PositionURI when present; otherwise derive https://www.usajobs.gov/job/{PositionID|DocumentID|MatchedObjectId}
source_job_id_rule: list-payload: preserve PositionID, DocumentID, or MatchedObjectId as stable source_job_id.
title_company_rule: reject rows missing title, company context, or usable canonical/apply URL; reject placeholders and blank titles
location_text_rule: list-payload: preserve PositionLocationDisplay and PositionLocation city/subdivision/country fields.
country_region_city_rule: list-payload: normalize CountryCode/CountryName conservatively and preserve CityName/CountrySubDivisionCode.
remote_type_rule: list-payload: map UserArea.Details.RemoteIndicator true/false or legacy Jobs remote flags only.
posting_date_rule: list-payload: preserve PublicationStartDate; legacy DateDisplay open date is fallback evidence only.
rate_limit: strict official API rate limit with API-key/user-agent headers and long cooldown after 429/403

quality_threshold.public_write_rule: keep disabled/collect-when-disabled off until bounded live canary and source quality evidence are approved

quarantine_reason: registry-backed but disabled; live canary/source quality evidence pending

runner_interface.normalize: server/ingestion/parserContract.js normalized posting shape plus source-specific normalizer
runner_interface.writeAccepted: source runner accepted path updates public read model only after validation
runner_interface.writeQuarantine: source runner quarantine path records reason and keeps row out of public index

next_action: keep disabled until bounded live canary proves source quality and official API credential handling
certification_blockers: live canary/source quality evidence pending; no production source apply has been run
